instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security measures include TLS encryption and username/password authentication for MQTT communication via Mosquitto (Light, 2017), and Thingsboard implementing JWT-based authentication, role-based access control, and encryption for data in transit and at rest (Thingsboard, 2024). The RAMI4.0 reference architecture (DIN, 2016) defines security protocols within the communication layer to mitigate cybersecurity risks in industrial systems."
]
